headline: REITs Have Lagged. That’s Not the Whole Story.
summary: The real estate sector accounts for just 2% of the S&P 500 by market capitalization, and has underperformed for the past decade.

headline: Safehold: Return-Free-Risk Comes To Haunt Investors
summary: Safehold (SAFE) reported a 13% revenue increase in Q1-2026, but earnings per share declined year over year. Read the latest analysis on the REIT here.
